pi_items.source: examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/fix_container_lifecycle_issues/setup_task.sh:9-63 (setup script creates processor, Dockerfile, and compose yml under this path)

examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/fix_container_lifecycle_issues/task.json:2-15 (task goal states stop in under 3 seconds) & examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/fix_container_lifecycle_issues/verifier.py:40-51 (comments/logics treat <3s as the pass target)
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/fix_container_lifecycle_issues/verifier.py:40-51 (the verifier comments that >9s is a timeout/fail and branches accordingly)

privileged_info_summary: Setup_task.sh constructs the entire order-processor project under /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/order-processor, writing a synthetic processor.py without signal handling and a compose file naming the container order-processor, so the task data is generated locally; the description and verifier enforce a sub-3-second shutdown target with a 9-second timeout gate and streaming log checks.
